bug_report.summary: Unintended capitalization change in SSL section title (“SSL Configuration” -> “SSL configuration”)
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the SSL section header text
expected_behaviors: SSL section header text should remain unchanged unless explicitly part of the change (e.g., should still read “SSL Configuration”).
actual_behaviors: SSL section header now reads “SSL configuration” (lowercase “c”), differing from the prior UI.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change

bug_report.summary: “Browse for certificate…” button label missing/blank in SSL configuration area
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll to the SSL configuration section (bottom area of the tab)
Look at the button used to browse/select a certificate
expected_behaviors: The certificate selection button should display its label (e.g., “Browse for certificate…”).
actual_behaviors: The button is rendered as an empty/blank button without the expected text label.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change

bug_report.summary: PAT reveal (eye) control does not reveal PAT while pressed/held
steps_to_reproduce: Enter any value into Git PAT field
Press and hold the eye/reveal icon inside the PAT field
expected_behaviors: While the reveal icon is pressed/held, the PAT should be shown in clear text (temporarily unmasked).
actual_behaviors: PAT remains masked (shown as bullet dots) even while the reveal icon is being held.

bug_report.summary: File → Git submenu: 'Commit' becomes disabled for a new/unsaved library (was enabled before)
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new empty library (do not save to disk).
expected_behaviors: 'Commit' menu item should have the same enabled/disabled state as before the code change in this scenario.
actual_behaviors: 'Commit' is shown disabled/greyed out in the after-change build, while it is enabled in the before-change build.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change

bug_report.summary: File menu left icon/indicator column renders differently for several items (visual artifacts/misalignment)
steps_to_reproduce: Start JabRef and open the File menu on the Welcome screen.
Inspect the leftmost icon/indicator gutter for menu items around “Save library”, “Save library as…”, and “Import”.
expected_behaviors: Menu items should have consistent icon/indicator spacing and rendering (no unexpected extra marks/strips).
actual_behaviors: Several menu items show changed rendering in the left gutter (small vertical marks/strips appear/shift compared to before), suggesting unintended icon/indicator misalignment or artifacting.

bug_report.summary: Network preferences: SSL configuration table collapses and 'No content in table' placeholder is rendered outside the table body
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll to the SSL configuration section (with no certificates configured).
expected_behaviors: SSL configuration shows a normal table with a visible body area.
If the table is empty, 'No content in table' is shown within the table body area (not below/outside it).
actual_behaviors: The SSL table body appears collapsed (only header/very small body visible).
The 'No content in table' text is rendered below/outside the table area.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change
